title: Choose Team's Main Workspace
excerpt: Our organization uses Monday.com, however the first department to use it established the “Main Workspace” for themselves and now it shows up as the landing page for all departments. There is no way to require they change…

posts.author: openscience (Audrey Grey)
posts.cookedHtml: Our organization uses Monday.com, however the first department to use it established the “Main Workspace” for themselves and now it shows up as the landing page for all departments. There is no way to require they change the main workspace. As a feature, we would like to be able to choose our own Main Workspace for our team, instead of always having to click to our Workspace. Would you be able to make it possible for either teams or individual users to choose their opening landing page?

posts.author: ElayaW (Elaya Walker)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be so helpful. Our Interim Project Manager made ours and now all department land there. It’s very frustrating for our HR Mgr or BizDev Officer to open the app to the production workspace.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @openscience ,
A feature called “Saved Views” is there in monday that allows you to create customized views of your boards. You can set up a Saved View to filter and display only the information relevant to your team.

For further implementation details connect us:
MSquare Support
Visit us here
Youtube Channel

Thank you
